# elizaos-plugins/registry Daily Update (Apr 25, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development activity on April 25, 2026, focused on expanding the ecosystem through the submission of new community plugins. Two pull requests were opened to integrate additional functionality into the registry.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS
*No completed work, bug fixes, refactoring, or documentation enhancements were reported for this date.*

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#351](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/351): Addition of `@undesirables/plugin-tcg-oracle` and `plugin-undesirables`.
*   [#350](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/350): Addition of `@traderouter/plugin-elizaos`.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*None.*

## NEW ISSUES
*None.*

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*None.*
